element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn to toggle speed for dodging vs. weaving between bullets
Persistent health between levels creates resource management tension
Stationary options above/below ship; piercing beam; spin-pattern smart bomb
Orbiting options; energy balls track enemies; invulnerability smart bomb
Charge timing mechanic; full-screen antimatter smart bomb
Opposing-direction orbits; bouncing balls off geometry; melee-range drone smart bomb (leaves ship vulnerable)
Critical for sustaining health across persistent level progression
Trading a weapon slot for screen-clear effect; enables tactical weapon slot management
Affects enemy bullet density; hidden difficulty available via cheat codes

typical_relief_triggers: Switching to appropriate weapon for enemy wave type
Activating smart bomb to clear screen
Slowing ship speed to weave between dense bullet patterns
typical_tension_triggers: Enemy bullet density increases (based on difficulty setting)
Limited weapon slots forcing tactical choices
Ricochet weapon vulnerability during smart bomb attack
Persistent health carryover between levels raises stakes
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating difficulty through enemy bullet spam and weapon management constraints. Persistent health system creates continuous tension arc across level progression. Relief provided by weapon variety and tactical speed adjustment.

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden 'Funny' difficulty mode accessible via cheat codes (escalates difficulty dramatically)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory weapon acquisition; basic enemy patterns; learning speed-toggling mechanic
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Ricochet weapon introduction (challenging due to melee-range vulnerable smart bomb); increased bullet density on higher difficulties
difficulty_curve.late_game: Escalating enemy fire volume; resource depletion through persistent health system; boss encounters with unknown patterns
notable_spikes: Ricochet weapon smart bomb vulnerability creates tactical risk
Persistent health mechanic carries damage into subsequent levels
Hidden 'Funny' difficulty dramatically escalates bullet spam

notable_level_patterns.description: Health persists between levels, creating escalating tension and resource scarcity as player progresses. Encourages conservative playstyle and strategic power-capsule collection.
Limited 3-weapon storage requires tactical replacement decisions. Smart bomb sacrifices weapon slot to enable new pickups, creating moment-to-moment strategic tension.

Three speed tiers allow real-time toggle between avoidance (fast) and precision weaving (slow). Creates layered difficulty: players can bypass some threats via speed or commit to threading needle patterns.
Difficulty setting primarily modulates enemy bullet volume rather than enemy placement or AI. Creates tunable pacing without structural level redesign.
